items.summary: mong game sau này cho giao lưu với bạn bè để có động lực cày,game chơi tốt hay,tiếc là al dịch nên nó hơi khô khan tý.
items.author: 27 Leady

items.title: [Google Play 中评] ★3 It's a very good game, actually I think
items.summary: It's a very good game, actually I think it's very underrated. From the story to the overall atmosphere of this game,I love it . But one thing that's been keeping me from playing lately is the gacha system — I don't want to sound greedy because the game is very generous when it comes to pulls. Now from recent banners I wasn't able to get the character because I lost 3 of my guaranteed Ssr and after that, it happend again and again. Maybe increase the rate of getting the character in their banner?
items.author: Joanna Aloyah
